mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EVENT_COUPON (COUPON_CODE, E_ID, ID) VALUES (#{coupon_code}, #{e_id}, #{id})
mapper.select: SELECT C.COUPON_CODE, C.DISCOUNT, C.COUPON_END, C.COUPON_MAX, C.COUPON_INFO, C.COUPON_USED, C.ID, C.COUPON_TYPE, C.COUPON_CATAGORY FROM COUPON C JOIN EVENT_COUPON EC ON C.COUPON_CODE = EC.COUPON_CODE AND C.ID = EC.ID WHERE EC.E_ID = #{e_id} AND C.COUPON_END >= SYSDATE
